Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts product data, promotions, and seasonal inventory highlights from the website.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features accurate, up-to-date product details and pricing, eliminating manual catalog lookups.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email including subject line, body copy, and calls-to-action tailored to R1 Concepts brand voice and current product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, on-brand email content daily without requiring a copywriter, saving hours of creative work each day.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot, assigns it to the target contact lists, and triggers the send via the Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full email build-and-send workflow in HubSpot, ensuring consistent daily outreach to segmented audiences without manual intervention.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls current Dynamic Friction Company product listings, featured parts, and promotional offers from the DFC website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with the latest DFC inventory and deals, removing the need for manual product research.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email with DFC-branded subject lines, persuasive body content, and product-specific calls-to-action.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers fresh, high-quality marketing copy every day tailored to DFC's brand identity, eliminating the creative bottleneck.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Builds the email campaign in HubSpot, maps it to the appropriate DFC contact lists, and dispatches it via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Fully automates daily email deployment to DFC audiences, ensuring reliable, on-schedule delivery with built-in engagement tracking.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot including customer details, order history, and issue descriptions.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all ticket context in one pull, giving the AI full visibility into the customer's situation without manual lookups.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and urgency, then drafts a context-aware reply referencing product knowledge and DFC website resources.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Dramatically reduces first-response time by auto-categorizing tickets and producing draft replies, letting support agents review and send rather than write from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-assigned classification, tags, and attaches the draft reply for agent review before sending.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the entire support workflow inside HubSpot with enriched metadata, enabling faster agent approvals and cleaner reporting on issue trends.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Retrieves Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured as HubSpot form entries or contacts.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Consolidates scattered customer issue data from Amazon flyer responses into a single queryable source, preventing lost feedback.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs each submission into a structured Google Sheet with categorized columns for ongoing team analysis and trend tracking.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a live, shareable dashboard of customer issues that updates automatically, enabling fast identification of recurring product or fulfillment problems.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Catches high-intent customer behavior the moment it happens, giving the sales team a window to engage while interest is fresh.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alerts to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams channels and email with customer details and activity summary.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables immediate sales follow-up on active prospects, compressing response time from hours to minutes and increasing close rates.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI assistant on R1 Concepts channels, answering product questions, guiding purchases, and handling common inquiries.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide instant 24/7 customer support, reducing wait times and freeing human agents to focus on complex cases. (Currently in development.)

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using target keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand's niche.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide initial net across the open web, surfacing creators that platform-only searches would miss.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / Google API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls detailed creator profiles, follower counts, engagement metrics, and recent content from YouTube, Instagram, and Google results.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds rich creator profiles with real performance data, enabling informed qualification rather than guesswork.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and ranks discovered creators by relevance, audience fit, and content alignment using AI-driven keyword and profile analysis.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Reduces hours of manual creator research to minutes by intelligently filtering and prioritizing the best-fit creators for outreach.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighted criteria such as audience size, engagement quality, niche relevance, and content consistency.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Transforms subjective creator evaluation into a repeatable, data-driven scoring system, ensuring the team pursues only the highest-value partnerships.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and prompt configurations stored in Google Drive for personalized creator messaging.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures outreach follows proven, optimized sequences rather than starting from scratch, improving response rates with each campaign.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using their profile data and the learned sequence templates.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly tailored, human-sounding outreach at scale, dramatically increasing the volume of creators contacted without sacrificing personalization.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators and logs send status for follow-up tracking.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the actual sending and tracking of outreach emails, keeping the pipeline moving without manual email-by-email effort.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies and pulls in full conversation threads for context-aware response generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Captures every creator response in real time, ensuring no interested creator falls through the cracks due to missed emails.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical negotiation records, past influencer conversations, and deal parameters to inform the AI's response strategy.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds every AI reply in real negotiation precedents, producing responses that reflect actual deal norms and brand boundaries.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts context-aware, negotiation-savvy replies using the creator's message, conversation history, and learned negotiation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles the back-and-forth of creator negotiations intelligently, accelerating deal closure while maintaining consistent brand positioning and fair terms.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted negotiation reply back to the creator and updates the conversation thread for continuity.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps negotiations moving at speed without requiring a team member to manually compose each response, compressing deal timelines significantly.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify qualifying items.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual cross-referencing between vehicle lists and availability guides, ensuring accurate weekly load sheets every time.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Creates the Must Have Monday marketing email in HubSpot, attaching the generated load sheet and corresponding sales sheet, then schedules or sends the email to the distribution list.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Automates the entire weekly MHM email build and send process, freeing the marketing team from repetitive email assembly every Monday.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Sends a notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the load sheet has been generated and the HubSpot email has been sent.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Keeps the sales and marketing teams instantly informed of weekly MHM campaign status without requiring manual check-ins.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product details and launch context.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces polished, on-brand email content in seconds, eliminating the creative bottleneck of writing launch emails from scratch each time.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates First to Market email drafts in HubSpot with the AI-generated content, embeds sales sheets, and prepares them for review and scheduling.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers ready-to-send email drafts directly in HubSpot, reducing campaign setup time from hours to minutes for every new product launch.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including lead counts, conversion rates, and email performance data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automatically gathers CRM performance data that would otherwise require manual export and compilation from multiple HubSpot reports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls website traffic metrics from GA4, search performance data from Google Search Console, and SMS campaign metrics from Attentive.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates multi-platform marketing analytics into a single data pipeline, eliminating the need to log into four separate platforms each month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48-55 of the monthly Marketing Highlights deck with the aggregated metrics, formatting charts and data tables automatically.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Transforms what was a tedious monthly slide-building task into an automated update, saving the marketing team significant time on recurring reporting.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes current search performance and identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts is underperforming relative to competitors.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints high-value keyword opportunities that competitors are ranking for, ensuring every blog post targets a real search demand gap.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog content targeting the identified keyword gaps, including meta descriptions, headings, and internal linking suggestions.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready SEO content at scale, enabling a consistent content cadence that would otherwise require a dedicated content writer.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog content to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO optimization settings configured for maximum search visibility.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Automates the entire publish workflow including Yoast configuration, ensuring every post goes live fully optimized without manual CMS work.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Processes vendor purchase order exports from Dream ERP, extracting open PO details including vendor info, order dates, quantities, and expected delivery dates.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates the extraction and parsing of PO data that was previously copied manually from ERP screens, eliminating data entry errors.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating vendor records and triggering automated chase email sequences for overdue or upcoming POs.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs and the New Availability Guide data via file upload, then matches and cross-references parts against available inventory.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Generates a formatted DFC load sheet Excel file with matched parts, quantities, and pricing, ready for download directly from the browser.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Delivers a production-ready Excel load sheet in seconds, replacing what was a manual spreadsheet formatting process prone to errors and inconsistencies.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Navigates the Attentive dashboard via Chrome browser automation, locates and clones the previous week's MHM SMS campaign as the base for the new campaign.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Eliminates the repetitive manual process of logging into Attentive and rebuilding campaigns from scratch each week, ensuring consistent campaign structure.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's vehicle name and adjusts the scheduled send time, then saves and schedules the campaign.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Extracts comprehensive sales transaction data from Dream ERP including order history, customer purchase patterns, product categories, and revenue figures.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Centralizes all DFC sales intelligence into an automated pipeline, replacing manual data pulls that previously consumed hours of analyst time.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers based on purchase behavior and triggers automated email campaigns including reorder reminders, cross-sell recommendations, and win-back sequences for lapsed buyers.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Drives incremental revenue through precisely targeted campaigns that reach the right customer at the right time, all without manual list building or email creation.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS campaigns to customer segments for time-sensitive promotions, reorder nudges, and win-back offers based on the sales analysis.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen, detecting the file and extracting its details for processing.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Removes the need for manual handoffs by automatically detecting when the weekly file is ready, ensuring the workflow starts instantly upon upload.

Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Automates file hosting and link generation, ensuring the download link is always current and eliminating broken or outdated file references.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the email to send Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a fully automated weekly email campaign that requires zero manual intervention from file receipt to send, guaranteeing consistent Saturday morning delivery.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B-focused SEO blog content targeting automotive shops, distributors, and fleet operators with industry-specific language and keyword optimization.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Scales B2B content production that speaks directly to DFC's target buyer personas, building organic search authority in a competitive aftermarket niche.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog content to the DFC WordPress site with proper formatting, categories, tags, and SEO metadata configured.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Maintains a consistent publishing cadence of optimized B2B content without requiring manual CMS work, steadily growing DFC's organic search footprint.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Detects newly published Friction Friday video each week and extracts video metadata, transcript, and embed URL.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual content monitoring and ensures the weekly workflow triggers automatically every Friday without staff intervention.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Generates and publishes a blog post featuring the embedded video, an AI-written summary, and SEO metadata.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Builds and sends a branded weekly email to the DFC subscriber list with the video embed, blog link, and call-to-action.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Sends a short SMS notification with the video link to opted-in contacts, while Microsoft Teams receives a completion summary for the team.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Audits all existing R1 Concepts workflows—site visit triggers, welcome series, re-engagement sequences—identifying redundancies, gaps, and enrollment issues.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Ensures every site visitor and new contact enters the right nurture path at the right time, improving email deliverability, engagement rates, and lead-to-customer conversion.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts customer records and their unique Dream CustomerIDs along with purchase history and account details.

Bomb File Project.action: Defines project scope, identifies data sources, and outlines the technical requirements for the bomb file system.

Claudia Automation.action: Defines the automation scope and identifies the processes Claudia currently handles manually that are candidates for automation.

Shirly Invoice PDF Automation.action: Maps out the current invoice PDF generation and delivery workflow to identify automation entry points and required integrations.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Monitors the R1 Concepts YouTube channel for new weekly video uploads and extracts the video URL, transcript, and metadata.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Auto-generates an SEO-optimized blog post with the embedded video, AI-written summary, and relevant product links for R1 Concepts.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Creates and distributes a branded email to the R1 subscriber list featuring the new video, blog link, and promotional CTA.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Sends an SMS alert with the new video link to opted-in R1 contacts, and posts a completion notification to Microsoft Teams.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Maximizes content reach through a high-open-rate mobile channel while keeping the marketing team informed of each successful weekly cycle.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls keyword ranking positions, impressions, clicks, and CTR data for all DFC blog posts generated by the SEO agent.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides clear visibility into which AI-generated posts are gaining search traction, allowing the team to double down on winning topics and refine underperformers.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Collects traffic, engagement, and conversion metrics for blog pages—sessions, time on page, bounce rate, and goal completions.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Quantifies the real business impact of each blog post beyond rankings, connecting content output to actual user behavior and revenue-driving actions.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves blog post metadata and Yoast SEO scores to assess content quality, publishing cadence, and on-page optimization compliance.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Ensures every published post meets SEO best practices and tracks the agent's output volume, giving leadership a clear efficiency metric for the automation investment.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Extracts monthly keyword performance data—rankings, impressions, clicks, and CTR—for all R1 Concepts blog posts produced by the agent.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Gives the R1 team a clear monthly view of search visibility growth attributable to the blog agent, justifying continued investment in automated content.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Gathers monthly traffic and engagement data for R1 blog pages including sessions, user behavior flow, and conversion events.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Connects blog content directly to measurable business outcomes like product page visits and purchases, proving the agent's contribution to the sales pipeline.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Compiles blog output metrics including total posts published, content categories covered, and on-page SEO health for the monthly report.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides a comprehensive efficiency scorecard showing how much content the agent produces versus manual effort, reinforcing the ROI of the automation.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Receives incoming vendor PO invoice emails and extracts attached PDF files for processing.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Removes the manual bottleneck of printing, stamping, signing, and re-scanning invoices — turning a multi-minute per-document task into seconds of automated processing.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Sends the stamped and signed invoice PDF back via email to the appropriate recipient or filing destination.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Ensures signed invoices are delivered instantly upon processing, accelerating vendor payment timelines and maintaining a digital audit trail.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Feeds organic search and page visit data into HubSpot to enrich prospect activity tracking across DFC's key landing pages.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Provides visibility into which prospects are actively researching DFC services, enabling timely and relevant outreach rather than cold follow-ups.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Ingests incoming R1 Concepts customer support tickets and captures ticket details including category, urgency, and customer information.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the latest weekly performance data from all active paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Delivers the formatted weekly checkup report to the team's inboxes with key highlights and any flagged areas of concern.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Extracts full-month performance data across all paid channels including budget utilization, creative performance, and conversion metrics.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Formats the aggregated data into a structured monthly report with key takeaways, slide-ready sections, and executive-level summaries.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Cuts monthly report creation from hours of manual formatting and analysis down to an automated deliverable, freeing the team to focus on strategy rather than slides.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Sends the completed monthly report to stakeholders, ready to be dropped into end-of-month presentation slides.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Identifies customers who completed the Amazon flyer warranty registration and exports their contact data for audience building.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana projects and tasks for updates, approaching deadlines, and status changes across active workstreams.
Asana Agent.impact: Provides automated oversight of project progress, ensuring no tasks slip through the cracks without requiring manual Asana check-ins.

Asana Agent.action: Delivers the AI-generated Asana status digest to the relevant team members via email.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps the team aligned on project status directly in their inbox, reducing the need for status meetings and ensuring everyone has the same visibility into workload and deadlines.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures meeting transcripts and notes from media team meetings held on Teams.

Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Converts unstructured meeting conversations into clear, assignable tasks in seconds — ensuring accountability and follow-through on every commitment made in the meeting.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Extracts active search ad copy and associated performance metrics including quality scores, CTR, conversion rates, and impression share.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Automatically gathers all the data needed to evaluate search ad effectiveness, replacing manual exports and cross-referencing across campaigns.

Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act audit report directly to the team, creating a regular optimization rhythm that continuously improves search ad performance without manual analysis.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Pulls the latest data from the Agent Tracker sheet, including agent names, statuses, owners, and recent activity logs.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Formats the raw tracker data into a clean, readable weekly summary with highlights, status changes, and any flagged items.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Receives the vehicle spec submission (make, model, year) from a HubSpot form and queries the DFC catalog to identify stocked parts and inventory gaps for that vehicle.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the matched and missing parts data into a clean, structured Excel-ready layout organized by product category.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Saves hours of manual spreadsheet work by producing a presentation-ready file that clearly separates stocked items from gaps.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends the formatted Excel file to Mark with a summary of what DFC stocks for the submitted vehicle and what's missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Mark receives a complete, actionable catalog file within minutes of submitting a vehicle spec, replacing what used to be a multi-hour manual process.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status data — including on-hand quantities, on-order status, and in-transit shipments — for every part on the weekly backorder report.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces the manual lookup process that a dozen people currently perform independently, centralizing all inventory intelligence in one automated pass.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the weekly backorder report with the live inventory data, flags dead-end parts that have no available source, and highlights critical shortages.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered items, including updated ETAs, alternative suggestions for dead-end parts, and status summaries.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to compile a complete make/model/year reference sheet for two-piece rotors across all three brands.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Aggregates competitor and supplier catalog data that would take days to manually compile into a single automated extraction, covering three major brands at once.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped two-piece rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps, gaps, and market opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC already competes and where new product opportunities exist across three major rotor brands without any manual comparison work.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Runs automated customer outreach emails to gather demand data and purchase interest for two-piece rotors across the identified vehicle applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real customer demand signals to validate which gaps are worth filling, ensuring product development decisions are backed by market data.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino to review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Dino receives a single, comprehensive reference document combining supplier catalogs, DFC coverage analysis, and customer demand data — ready for strategic decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting the full ad copy from every active creative including headlines, descriptions, and CTA text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility across all active ad copy in seconds, eliminating the need to manually click through dozens of campaigns on multiple platforms.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for the specified phrases and compiles a flagged list identifying the exact campaign, ad, field, and copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance issues, outdated claims, or restricted phrases across hundreds of ads instantly — a task that would otherwise require hours of manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends the flagged list as a structured email report showing every match with its exact location, field, and surrounding copy for quick review and action.
Meta Investigation.impact: The team can immediately act on flagged ads without logging into any ad platform, accelerating compliance fixes and reducing risk of policy violations.
